testcase.name: test_user_can_enter_email_on_the_login_page[chromium]

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected to have Value 'testuser@example.com' Actual value: None Error: element(s) not found Call log: - Expect "to_have_value" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for get_by_role("textbox", name="Mobile / Email", exact=True)

testcase.failure: tests_generated/test_user_can_enter_email_on_the_login_page.py:9: in test_user_can_enter_email_on_the_login_page expect(email_input).to_have_value("testuser@example.com") E AssertionError: Locator expected to have Value 'testuser@example.com' E Actual value: None E Error: element(s) not found E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_value" with timeout 5000ms E - waiting for get_by_role("textbox", name="Mobile / Email", exact=True)

testcase.name: test_user_can_see_the_otp_code_field_on_the_signup_verification_page[chromium]

failure.message: Failed: no real actions or assertions in the test body; unresolved NEEDS marker — step skipped: locator for OTP code input field with id 'otp-code'; NEEDS: locator for OTP code input field with id 'otp-code'

testcase.failure: tests_generated/test_user_can_see_the_otp_code_field_on_the_signup_verification_page.py:5: in test_user_can_see_the_otp_code_field_on_the_signup_verification_page pytest.fail("no real actions or assertions in the test body; unresolved NEEDS marker — step skipped: locator for OTP code input field with id 'otp-code'; NEEDS: locator for OTP code input field with id 'otp-code'") E Failed: no real actions or assertions in the test body; unresolved NEEDS marker — step skipped: locator for OTP code input field with id 'otp-code'; NEEDS: locator for OTP code input field with id 'otp-code'

testcase.name: test_user_is_redirected_to_otp_verification_page_after_clicking_login_button[chromium]

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('https://app\\.mazu\\.in/otp-verification')' Actual value: https://app.mazu.in/signup Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 3 × unexpected value "https://app.mazu.in/login" 6 × unexpected value "https://app.mazu.in/signup"

testcase.failure: tests_generated/test_user_is_redirected_to_otp_verification_page_after_clicking_login_button.py:16: in test_user_is_redirected_to_otp_verification_page_after_clicking_login_button expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r"https://app\.mazu\.in/otp-verification")) E AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('https://app\\.mazu\\.in/otp-verification')' E Actual value: https://app.mazu.in/signup E Call log: E - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms E 3 × unexpected value "https://app.mazu.in/login" E 6 × unexpected value "https://app.mazu.in/signup"
